description: With its durable construction and generous storage, this puma Team Backpack II is a great buy for on-the-go convenience and easy style. Length: 43 cm  Made of 100% polyester for durability One main zippered compartment with a small padded divider, and has one zippered pouch insideWide padded and adjustable shoulder straps for carrying easeMildly padded and ergonomically shaped back for ease of wearWhite piping with puma branding in print on the front for styleCare only hand wash Clean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not bleach, tumble dry or wring Line dry Do not iron
